message:
test(fcp-core): pin PcsMode + KeyManagementMode zone-routing variant Display + serde (flywheel_connectors-vrcyi)

Bead asks for ZoneRouteHint Display + serde tag pinning. No type literally
named ZoneRouteHint exists in fcp-core; the closest "zone route hint"
analogues are PcsMode + KeyManagementMode at pcs.rs:71+88. Both are
per-zone, internally-tagged, snake_case-renamed enums that route a zone
through one of two key-management paths. Existing
mesh_placement_hint_serde_ordering.rs / connector_topology_serde.rs /
zone_route_display_serde.rs already cover MeshPlacementHint /
DeviceSelector / TransportMode + ZoneTransportPolicy; these two are the
residual unpinned zone-routing-mode pair.

Coverage: PcsMode and KeyManagementMode use DISTINCT tag keys (`mode`
vs `type`) — pin disjoint-tag-space sentinel so they never converge,
default-variant pinning (Disabled / StandardRotation), JSON tag values
+ payload preservation (epoch + 32-byte hex commit_ref), CBOR
Value-inspection workaround for the internally-tagged + hex_or_bytes
Content-shim quirk, PascalCase rejection sentinels, unknown-tag
rejection, distinct-payload-produces-distinct-JSON sentinel for epoch
and commit_ref axes, cross-enum tag-key disjointness.

15 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-vrcyi cargo test -p
fcp-core --test zone_route_hint_variant_display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
